brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Pull the phantom's logs. All four. I want to see the exact timestamps.

expected.sql: SELECT timestamp, message FROM logs WHERE tags['service'] = 'chrono-portal-mirror' ORDER BY timestamp

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. service:chrono-portal-mirror — just that service.'
Carol: 'Not enough. There are exactly four phantom rows. service:chrono-portal-mirror.'
Carol: 'Query error. service:chrono-portal-mirror — colon, no quotes, no equals.'
Carol: 'service:chrono-portal-mirror. Filter on the service tag.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Those seconds. She already knew which ones.
